crm.title: Client CRM

relances.title: Automatic Follow-ups
relances.desc: Sayerli sends email reminders every morning to clients with overdue invoices. Zero missed follow-ups.

howItWorks.title: From quote to payment — zero re-entry
howItWorks.sub: Sayerli follows the real flow of your transactions. Every step chains automatically — no data to retype.

step1.title: Sign up in 30 seconds
step1.desc: Create your company, add your logo and tax info (ICE, IF, RC). No credit card needed.

step2.title: Add clients & catalogue
step2.desc: Centralise your clients with ICE and tax IDs. Build your service catalogue to reuse your rates in one click.

step3.title: Send a quote in 2 min
step3.desc: Write in MAD, EUR or USD. Share by WhatsApp or email — your client accepts or declines directly from their phone.

step4.title: Delivery note → Invoice
step4.desc: On acceptance, generate the delivery note. Once delivered, convert to invoice in one click — lines, prices and currency carried over automatically.

step5.title: Collect & track everything
step5.desc: Record bank transfer, cash or cheque. Reminders fire automatically. The sales journal is always ready for your accountant.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: Start free. Scale as you grow. Pay in MAD.

whyChoose.title: Why Businesses Choose Sayerli
whyChoose.sub: Concrete benefits for your daily work. Not promises — measurable results.

card1.title: Save Hours Every Week
card1.desc: Automate quote and invoice creation. What took 2 hours in Excel now takes 5 minutes.

card2.title: Stop Using Excel
card2.desc: No more lost files, broken formulas, or calculation errors. Sayerli handles it all, error-free.

card3.title: Professional Invoices
card3.desc: Every invoice is numbered, dated, and compliant. Send by email in one click — clients will be impressed.

card4.title: Faster Payments
card4.desc: Track every payment in real time. Automatic reminders reduce payment delays by 40% on average.

card5.title: Better Client Management
card5.desc: A complete history per client. Find every exchange, quote, and payment in seconds.

card6.title: Business Insights in Real Time
card6.desc: Visualize your monthly revenue, top clients, and trends. Make the right decisions with the right data.

workflow.title: Quote → DN → Invoice → Paid
workflow.sub: The real flow of your transactions, with zero re-entry. Sayerli links every step automatically.

step1.title: Create the Client
step1.desc: Add ICE, tax ID, type (COMPANY / FREELANCE / INDIVIDUAL) and contact details in 30 seconds.

step2.title: Send the Quote
step2.desc: Write in MAD/EUR/USD. Share by WhatsApp or email — public link, no client account needed.

step3.title: Client Accepts Online
step3.desc: The client clicks Accept from their phone. You get an instant notification.

step4.title: Delivery Note
step4.desc: Generate the DN from the accepted quote. Send it, mark as delivered. Client can confirm from their portal.

step5.title: Convert to Invoice
step5.desc: One click from the delivered DN. Lines, prices and currency carried over automatically. Sequential numbering.

step6.title: Collect & Analyse
step6.desc: Record the payment. Auto-reminders if overdue. Sales journal ready for your accountant.

analytics.title: Drive your business with data
analytics.sub: A complete financial dashboard. Understand your revenue, clients, and trends at a glance.

comparison.title: Sayerli vs the Alternatives
comparison.sub: Why Moroccan SMEs switch to Sayerli and never look back.

automation.title: Sayerli works, even while you sleep
automation.sub: Smart automations that eliminate repetitive tasks and let you focus on what matters.

item1.title: Automatic Reminders
item1.desc: Sayerli sends reminders to clients whose invoices are due or overdue. You never lose money through forgetfulness again.
item1.detail1: Reminder at D-3, D-0 and D+7

item2.title: Delivery Note → Invoice in 1 Click
item2.desc: Create the delivery note from the accepted quote. Mark it delivered. Convert to invoice — lines, prices and currency carried over automatically. Zero re-entry.

item3.title: Payment Tracking
item3.desc: Every recorded payment automatically updates the invoice status. Partial payments, deposits, balances — all tracked.

item4.title: Client Portal
item4.desc: Every client gets a unique, secure link to view their quotes and invoices and accept them online. No more back-and-forth emails.

item5.title: Service Catalogue
item5.desc: Save your recurring products and rates once. Find them in one click when creating any quote.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before getting started. And if your question isn't here, our team is available.
faq.q1: Is Sayerli suitable for small businesses?
faq.a1: Absolutely. Sayerli is designed specifically for Moroccan SMEs — artisans, consultants, agencies, retailers, service providers. The interface is simple and requires no training. You're up and running in under 5 minutes.
faq.a2: Yes. With Pro and Business plans, you can invite multiple collaborators with specific roles: Admin, Manager, Sales, or Accountant. Each role has its own permissions to protect your sensitive data.
faq.q3: Can I create professional compliant invoices?
faq.a3: Yes. All invoices generated by Sayerli are automatically numbered, dated, and include all required information. They're ready to send to your clients and accepted by your accountant.
faq.a4: For each invoice, you can record payments (cash, transfer, card, check, mobile) in one click. Sayerli automatically calculates the remaining amount, updates the invoice status, and alerts you when overdue.
faq.a5: Yes! The Starter plan is completely free, with no time limit and no credit card. It allows you to manage up to 5 clients, 10 quotes, and 10 invoices per month. Upgrade to Pro anytime you need more.
faq.a6: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your dashboard. No commitment, no penalty. Your data is always preserved regardless of your plan.
faq.a7: Security is our priority. All data is encrypted, stored on secure servers, and backed up daily. Access is protected by JWT authentication with granular roles and permissions.
faq.q8: Can I send a quote directly to my client?
faq.a8: Yes. Sayerli generates a unique public link for each quote. Your client can view the quote online, accept or decline it — without needing to create an account. You get an instant notification for every action.

security.title: Your data is in good hands
security.sub: Security is not optional. Every aspect of Sayerli is designed to protect your data and your clients' data.

item1.title: Secure Authentication
item1.desc: JWT-protected login with automatic expiration. Each session is verified server-side on every request.

item2.title: Encrypted Data
item2.desc: All passwords are hashed with bcrypt (factor 12). Communications are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS.

item3.title: Daily Backups
item3.desc: Your data is automatically backed up every day. Recovery is possible at any time in case of an incident.

item4.title: Cloud Infrastructure
item4.desc: Hosted on professional servers with high availability. Your data is never on your local computer.

item5.title: Role-based Permissions
item5.desc: Granular access control. Admin, Manager, Sales, Accountant — each role sees only what they need.

roadmap.title: Sayerli's Vision for Tomorrow
roadmap.sub: Sayerli grows with you. Here are the features we're building to transform how you work even more.
roadmap.notifyText: Get notified when a new feature becomes available.

item1.title: Inventory Management
item1.desc: Manage your inventory, track your products, and receive low stock alerts directly in Sayerli.

item2.title: AI Assistant
item2.desc: An intelligent assistant that writes your quotes, suggests prices, and anticipates your needs from your data.

item3.title: Project Management
item3.desc: Turn your accepted quotes into projects with tasks, deadlines, and assigned teams. All in one place.

item4.title: Online Payments
item4.desc: CMI, PayZone, and PayPal integration. Your clients pay directly from their quote or invoice online.

item5.title: Advanced Analytics
item5.desc: Revenue forecasts, trend analysis, exportable reports in Excel and PDF for your accountant.

item6.title: Mobile Application
item6.desc: Manage your business from your phone. Create quotes, collect payments, wherever you are.

ADMIN.label: Administrator
ADMIN.desc: Full access except billing. Manages the entire team.

MANAGER.label: Manager
MANAGER.desc: Full operational management. No settings access.

DAF.label: CFO / Finance Director
DAF.desc: Financial read access + export. Cannot create anything.

COMPTABLE.label: Accountant
COMPTABLE.desc: Payments and exports. Internal salaried accountant.

RESPONSABLE_RECOUVREMENT.label: Collections Manager
RESPONSABLE_RECOUVREMENT.desc: Reminders and collections for unpaid invoices only.

CAISSIER.label: Cashier
CAISSIER.desc: Records received payments. Cash access only.

COMMERCIAL.label: Sales Rep
COMMERCIAL.desc: Client and quote management. Sees all accounts.

COMMERCIAL_PROPRE.label: Sales Agent
COMMERCIAL_PROPRE.desc: Like Sales Rep, but limited to own clients only.

testimonials.badge: Already managing their business with Sayerli
testimonials.title: Real results, not marketing copy
testimonials.sub: Freelancers, self-employed and Moroccan SMEs — here's what they actually say.
testimonials.q1quote: I used to edit a generic PDF in Word. Clients sometimes waited 2 days. With Sayerli, it takes 3 minutes — the client gets a professional link on WhatsApp and accepts from their phone.
testimonials.q2quote: What convinced me was the delivery note. Before, I had to retype everything into an invoice. Now: quote accepted → delivery note → invoice in one click. Zero re-entry. Zero errors.
testimonials.q3quote: We have 3 sales reps creating quotes every day. The sales journal gives me in 10 seconds what my accountant used to ask for at the end of every month. The time savings are immediate.
